childhood.familyBackground: Son of James Kellogg III who was a partner at Spear, Leeds & Kellogg. Family involved in Wall Street trading.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: Spear, Leeds & Kellogg의 파트너인 제임스 켈로그 3세의 아들. 가족은 월스트리트 거래 관련.
childhood.education: Wall Street training and business education
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in Wall Street environment. Joined Spear, Leeds & Kellogg in 1967 at young age.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 월스트리트 환경에서 성장. 1967년 어린 나이에 Spear, Leeds & Kellogg 입사.

careerTimeline.event: Joined Spear, Leeds & Kellogg trading firm
careerTimeline.eventKo: Spear, Leeds & Kellogg 거래 회사 입사

careerTimeline.event: Became managing partner of Spear, Leeds & Kellogg following father's retirement
careerTimeline.eventKo: 아버지 은퇴 후 Spear, Leeds & Kellogg의 경영 파트너 승진

careerTimeline.event: Spear, Leeds & Kellogg handling over 10% of New York Stock Exchange volume
careerTimeline.eventKo: Spear, Leeds & Kellogg이 뉴욕증권거래소 거래량의 10% 이상 처리

careerTimeline.event: Sold Spear, Leeds & Kellogg to Goldman Sachs for $6.5 billion
careerTimeline.eventKo: Spear, Leeds & Kellogg을 골드만삭스에 65억 달러에 매각

careerTimeline.event: Retired as CEO of reinsurance company IAT

personalTraits.knownFor: Leadership of Spear Leeds Kellogg, $6.5B Goldman Sachs acquisition, Wall Street trading expertise
personalTraits.knownForKo: Spear Leeds Kellogg 리더십, 65억 달러 골드만삭스 인수, 월스트리트 거래 전문성
personalTraits.philanthropy: Major donations to US ski and snowboarding teams, John Peto Studio Museum founder and renovator
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 미국 스키 및 스노보드팀에 거액 기부, 존 페토 스튜디오 박물관 설립 및 개보수
